request_payload.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, I've been reviewing our civil defense preparedness. While some claim we're over-prepared, the truth is our systems are outdated. Neighboring countries invest 15% more in public emergency drills - that's a gap we can't ignore. Remember the 2024 power grid incident? We were lucky that time. Basic preparedness isn't about fear - it's about responsible planning. Our families deserve better protection. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
